## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the code of conduct.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation (if appropriate).
- [ ] I have run the tests locally and they all pass.
- [ ] I have added a changelog entry in the [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) file.

- [ ] I have labeled this pull request with the appropriate labels (e.g., bug, enhancement, documentation).
